all_posts.title: Gunman Detained After Press Dinner Shooting
all_posts.summary:
President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance were evacuated from the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner in Washington on Saturday after shots were fired at the hotel hosting the event. A suspect is now in custody and being questioned, Trump said.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

all_posts.title: HK Finance Chief Says City’s 2026 IPOs Have Raised $17.9 Billion
all_posts.summary: Hong Kong initial public offerings have raised more than HK$140 billion ($17.9 billion) this year, with the city maintaining its position as the world’s top IPO venue, Financial Secretary Paul Chan wrote in his weekly blog.
